devdoc.details: Replaces the Solidity-based EllipticCurve implementation with native P-256 verification

params.key: The DNSKEY RDATA (68 bytes: 4-byte header + 64-byte public key).
params.signature: The signature to verify (64 bytes: r + s).

returns._0: True iff the signature is valid.

devdoc.title: P256SHA256Algorithm

userdoc.notice: DNSSEC Algorithm 13 (ECDSAP256SHA256) implementation using EIP-7951 precompile
